name: roadmapsmith
description: Self-contained skill for Claude Code, Codex, and any host that reads SKILL.md. Creates and maintains ROADMAP.md coherent with real code — the agent proposes updates only when evidence exists, waits for OK, never modifies silently.

install.notes: The install script (install.js) copies both SKILL.md files to ~/.claude/skills/ and ~/.codex/skills/ automatically, detecting whichever host directories exist. Once installed, two slashcommands become available in the agent: /roadmap-init (once, at repo start) and /roadmap-update (whenever code changes). No CLI, no configs, no accounts. See github.com/PapiScholz/roadmapsmith for the full contract.

skills.name: roadmap-init
skills.description: Create a fresh ROADMAP.md by scanning the repo and asking the user 3 minimal questions. Groups tasks by phase and code area. Never overwrites an existing ROADMAP.md.

skills.name: roadmap-update
skills.description: Update ROADMAP.md truthfully based on real code. Full-scan the repo, evaluate evidence per task, propose a diff for user approval. Never flips [x] without verifiable evidence. v1.1: preflight scan mode choice, prose stale detection, PROSE UPDATE sub-section in diff.
